index.reminder: 💧 Remember to drink water!   💊 Check your medicines.

remedios.title: Medicines
remedios.reminder: Don't forget to take your medicines!

agua.title: Water
agua.goalReached: Wonderful! You reached your water goal today! 🎉
agua.goalMessage: Let's drink water calmly? {{remaining}} cups left.
agua.reminder: Gentle reminder every 2 hours to help you stay hydrated.

avisos.title: Notices
avisos.description: Here are the facility notices. Tap the speaker to listen!
avisos.notice1: Tomorrow we'll have a special breakfast at 8am!
avisos.notice2: Music activity in the living room at 3pm.

lazer.title: Leisure
lazer.description: Time to have fun! Choose an activity.
lazer.participationMessage: You want to participate in {{nome}}! Talk to a caregiver.

artes.title: Arts & Talents
artes.description: What will we do today? Choose an art!
artes.motorDescription: Exercises to prepare your hands for arts!

embroidery_instructions.step1: Hold the needle and thread calmly.
embroidery_instructions.step2: Pass the thread through the needle eye.
embroidery_instructions.step3: Tie a knot at the end of the thread.
embroidery_instructions.step4: Poke the needle in the fabric from bottom to top.
embroidery_instructions.step5: Pull the thread until the knot holds.
embroidery_instructions.step6: Now poke to the side, from top to bottom.
embroidery_instructions.step7: Keep making stitches side by side.

crochet_instructions.step1: Hold the crochet needle with your writing hand.
crochet_instructions.step2: Make a loop with the thread on your finger.
crochet_instructions.step3: Pass the needle through the loop and pull.
crochet_instructions.step4: That's a chain! Keep making more.
crochet_instructions.step5: For a single crochet, poke into the chain.
crochet_instructions.step6: Pull the thread and close the stitch.
crochet_instructions.step7: Repeat in each chain of the row.

painting_instructions.step3: Pass the brush in the paint gently.
painting_instructions.step4: Make light strokes on the paper.
painting_instructions.step6: Mix colors to create new ones!
painting_instructions.complete: How beautiful! Your painting looks wonderful! 🎨

livros.title: Books
livros.description: Let's read a book together? Search to see covers and descriptions.
livros.noResults: Search for a book to see results.
livros.error: Could not load books right now.

alfabetizacao.title: Literacy
alfabetizacao.description: Let's learn letters together! Tap to listen.

paciencia.title: Solitaire
paciencia.complete: Congratulations! You found all the pairs! 🎉
paciencia.description: Find the pairs! Tap on two cards.

emergency.title: Emergency button

emergency.info: In a real app, this would call emergency services.
